title: knishle's wavy leaves & foliage
description: Adds animated leaves and foliage, without the use of mods or shaders.
body:
IMPORTANT: TURN YOUR MIPMAP LEVELS TO 0 FOR THE BEST PERFORMANCE

With mipmap levels at zero this pack will perform extremely well, and should be compatible with all performance enhancing mods.

This pack is a part of my larger resourcepack, Dark Cottagecore. for consistent retextures, water retextures, colormaps and more, visit the projects page [here](https://modrinth.com/project/knishles-dark-cottagecore).

This resource pack adds animations to nearly all the foliage in the game. It covers all the leaves, grass, ferns, and vines. It uses the vanilla blockstate system to allow for subtle texture variation and the vanilla block texture animation system. This means it works fully without the use of additional client or server-side mods.

Video showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Zpl4UiQVSTQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

It also features lower ground foliage tiles, to allow for better visibility.

Have feedback? Want to join the discord server for this project and others? Please message me @gravitybreacher on discord to get access or have your questions about the pack answered.

You are welcome to use this pack in your modpacks, though credit would be greatly appreciated.
